title: International Friendship Day: Photography Competition
body: "On International Friendship Day, the UK in UAE is launching a competition to search for the best images which demonstrate the friendship between the UK and UAE. We are looking for a broad range of images that are creative, positive and of good quality. These might show a personal friendship, or demonstrate an ongoing cultural link between the UK and the UAE. If you are a UK in the UAE, we would love to see some of your cultural friendship pictures.  From today until the 30th September 2013, you can send your pictures to us at: ukinuae07@gmail.com  Guidelines: In entering, you agree to allow the FCO to use your image on FCO social media channels. The competition is aimed at amateur photographers. Please send your pictures in JPG format and a maximum of 2500 pixels wide or 2500 pixels high. Images should be standard RGB colour space. "
